HGSS.548.0000:
Hello, [0103,0000,0000]? We discovered
something about the Egg!\f
My assistant is at the Pokémon Center
in Violet City.\r
Could you talk to him?
HGSS.548.0001:
Bonjour!
You are Trainer?\f
Battle Gym Leader, win you did? [0200,0000]
HGSS.548.0002:
Ooh, la la!
Very indeed nice!
HGSS.548.0003:
Is that so? Then study shall you!\r
Follow me!\f
HGSS.548.0004:
Here, teacher I am.
Good it is you study here!\f
HGSS.548.0005:
There have been reports of Ghost-type
Pokémon appearing in Sprout Tower.\f
They say Normal-type Pokémon moves
have no effect on them.
HGSS.548.0006:
Hey, you’re a Pokémon Trainer?\f
If you beat the Gym Leader here,
you’ll be ready for prime time!
HGSS.548.0007:
Falkner, from the Violet City Pokémon
Gym, is a fine Trainer!\f
He inherited his father’s Gym and
has done a great job with it.
HGSS.548.0008:
You cannot have your Pokémon out
walking with you in some places.\f
Places like buildings, caves, and
where there are huge crowds.\f
But all you have to do is to put it in
a Poké Ball!
HGSS.548.0009:
Violet City
The City of Nostalgic Scents
HGSS.548.0010:
Violet City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Falkner\r
The Elegant Master of Flying Pokémon
HGSS.548.0011:
Sprout Tower\f
Experience the Way of Pokémon
to Cast Aside Your Doubts.
HGSS.548.0012:
Pokémon School\f
Earl will show you all
there is to Pokémon!
HGSS.548.0013:
Me oh my...
That Egg must be...!\f
HGSS.548.0014:
I see...
So it was handed from Mr. Pokémon to\r
Professor Elm, then from Professor Elm\r
to you.\f
Now I get it...\f
HGSS.548.0015:
That Egg is truly an important Egg.
Please do take good care of it for me.\f
Is that understood?\f
HGSS.548.0017:
Shard de Berry!
Shard de Berry!\f
Yah, yah!
I trade Berry for a Shard.\f
If ya bring me some Shards,
I will give ya three Berries, yah.\f
HGSS.548.0018:
Shard de Berry!
Shard de Berry!\f
Yah, yah!
I trade Berry for Shard.\f
If ya bring me some Shards,
I will give ya three Berries, yah.\f
Which Shard will ya trade for
de Berry? [0200,0000]
HGSS.548.0019:
More Shards to trade for
de Berries? [0200,0000]
HGSS.548.0020:
Yah, yah!
Come back when ya’ve changed\r
ya mind, yah.\f
HGSS.548.0021:
I’ll give ya de Berry set A
for de Red Shard, yah.\f
HGSS.548.0022:
I’ll give ya de Berry set B
for de Blue Shard, yah.\f
HGSS.548.0023:
I’ll give ya de Berry set C
for de Yellow Shard, yah.\f
HGSS.548.0024:
I’ll give ya de Berry set D
for de Green Shard, yah.\f
HGSS.548.0025:
Ya already have many Berries
of dis set.\f
Come back when ya need more, yah.\f
HGSS.548.0026:
We care about the traditional buildings
around here. That’s why even the\r
Poké Mart and Pokémon Center are\r
painted a bit somberly to blend in.
HGSS.548.0027:
Did you know that Pokégear allows you
to put marks and memos on its Map?\f
I’d love to have one of those
Pokégears, but my mom won’t let me.
